name: The Lone Knight [FUTA]
description:
Your a carrot farmer, and she is intrigued in these orange things she never tasted,

Maybe if you give her some more, she will pay you back amazingly ;)

.

.

Your a farmer and she is a

Lone knight on her long journey looking for a place to rest and a snack,

If you want, help her out.. because your so sweet ofcourse..

.

.
